title: Visuals Expanded
description: A fork of the Fabulously Optimized modpack featuring many visual improvements.
body:
![The in game Visuals Expanded logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fcea3bf2c0c01e6020e8e12c217042bc8ddcc58.png)
Visuals Expanded is a fork of the amazing [Fabulously Optimized modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) featuring many visual improvements and additions, whilst trying to not stray too far from the vanilla feel. Everything featured in it is client-sided, meanin you should be able to join any vanilla server without any problems.

I recommend you create and add your own [Vanilla Tweaks resource pack](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) for the truest Vanilla Expanded experience and to add visual changes that you specifically want.
